trending_videos.title: Scary Movie | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Marlon Wayans, Shawn Wayans, Anna Faris, Regina Hall
trending_videos.description:
We’re baaaaaack. Watch the official trailer for the new #ScaryMovie - only in theatres June 12. 

Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer (“Ghostface”), the Core Four are back in the killer’s crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe. Marlon Wayans (“Shorty”), Shawn Wayans (“Ray”), Anna Faris (“Cindy”), and Regina Hall (“Brenda”) reunite in Scary Movie alongside returning favorites and fresh faces to slash through reboots, remakes, requels, prequels, sequels, spin-offs, elevated horror, origin stories, anything with the word legacy in it, and every “final chapter” that absolutely isn’t final. Nothing is sacred. No trope survives. ​Every line gets crossed. The Wayans are back to cancel the Cancel Culture.

Connect with #ScaryMovie Online:
Website: https://www.scarymovie.film
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/scarymovie/
X: https://x.com/ScaryMovie
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ScaryMovie
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@scarymovie
Threads: https://

trending_videos.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Final Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
See you on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a

trending_videos.title: SCARY MOVIE 6 Official Trailer (2026) Marlon Wayans
trending_videos.description:
The parody franchise returns in Scary Movie 6 (2026).

Watch the official trailer featuring Marlon Wayans as the iconic comedy series takes aim at modern horror films once again. Packed with outrageous satire, unexpected cameos, and classic slapstick chaos, the sixth installment revives one of the most recognizable parody brands in film.

🔥 Horror parody returns
🔥 Marlon Wayans back in action
🔥 2026 comedy sequel

videos_without_transcripts.title: FIRST TIME PLAYING RESIDENT EVIL IN 15 YEARS AND ITS CINEMA (Resident Evil Requiem: Part 1)

trailersAndTeasers.insight: Half of the trending content consists of trailers and teasers, indicating strong audience interest in upcoming releases and franchise continuations.

contentStrategy.Paramount Pictures: Focus on leveraging known franchises and star power to generate interest.
contentStrategy.Netflix: Utilizing popular anime adaptations to drive anticipation for new releases.
contentStrategy.Gaming Channels: Leveraging nostalgia and popular game franchises to engage audiences.

collaborationPotential: Film studios and major streaming platforms can explore collaborations with popular YouTube creators to enhance reach and engagement.

emergingTrends.horrorComedy: Capitalize on the resurgence of horror-comedy films by exploring marketing campaigns and merchandise tie-ins.
emergingTrends.animeAdaptations: Invest in content that appeals to anime and manga fans, as adaptations continue to trend.
emergingTrends.gamingContent: Expand content around popular gaming franchises, focusing on both new releases and nostalgic elements.

audienceEngagement.interactiveContent: Explore interactive content formats such as live streams and Q&A sessions to engage dedicated fanbases of franchises.
audienceEngagement.cross-platformPromotion: Utilize cross-platform promotion strategies to maximize reach, especially for trailers and teasers.

conclusion.summary: The current YouTube trending landscape is dominated by trailers for upcoming films, anime adaptations, and content related to major gaming franchises. Creators and brands can capitalize on these trends by focusing on nostalgia, leveraging franchise popularity, and engaging audiences through interactive and cross-platform strategies.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
